channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 33 replies — 132.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-04 11:49 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931939
>>61931782
With comments like these biz should really be renamed to /trash.
Is this supposed to be funny?

61931956
>>61931684
Just glad we can all have a good laugh about it.

61931958
>>61931939
hi there triggered stinkie :}
we see you

61931976
>>61931907
well, you've learned how to dca, next step is to actually buy something worthwhile, like dogshit or bankrupted towel stock

61931997
>>61931976
don't forget GME :} the list of shit that is superior to even link is endless

61932038
>>61931958
Just keep doing what your doing. Sit in your chair in the corner and keep informing me of my financial performance on an hourly basis so that I dont need to open up the app. Thanks.

61932060
This site is shit now. I'm on here less and less. What a rubbish thread. Twitter completely ate /biz's lunch.

61932062
>>61931684
what's the deal with the LINK obsession? there are hundreds of bad cryptos to invest in, like every single one of them. why the singling out? reads like a psyop.

61932076
>>61932038
ok

61932086
>>61932062
Because linkies were smug. They fudded their own token endlessly to keep normies away from making it. We had to spend years listening to their grandiose scenarios, their $81k prediction and their lack of self awareness. Now linkies will spend years listening how bad they failed. Their hubris was their fall. Adem won.

61932119
>>61932062
>reads like a psyop.
/biz is a psyop board ran by banking cartel flunkies, anything that gets fudded here I assume is a threat to the bank niggers and I dive in out of spite

61932122
>>61932086
this
we fuddies are the warriors of justice
we will see to it that the linkie hubris is punished for all eternity
might i remind you all that one of link's first memes was "are nolinkers even human?"

61932285
>>61932086
ill agree with this in about 10 more years if link never hits 100

for the next 10 years ill buy link tho. should pump to 11 some day ,

61932295
yikes

61932298
chainlink will be sub $5 this year. let that sink in.

61932327
>>61932298
If it does I will put usd 5 million in, just to spite you, you insufferable fuck. Ffs. Give it a rest.

61932513
>>61932327
>i-i-i'm a bajillionaire....
cope, stinky

61932516
>>61932513
Haha, you don't understand. It doesn't matter what i do or do not have. Anons do.

61932522
If we could be guaranteed that link would moon to $500 tomorrow but 10% of us would be injected with AIDS. Would you guys vote for that happening?

61932558
Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe. It’s quite literally in their best interest to keep this shit low.

61932671
It has been a brutal hold and I'm better off focusing on a high income career than waiting for this shit. I could have semi retired in 2021 but didn't sell.

61932731
Crazy how these threads are always 95 percent the same brown fuddie cockroach hopping ids and replying to himself to give the illusion of consensus.
Like there's no point whatsoever. Everyone's on x where you're salty and blocked and nothing posted here changes or does anything lmao. A million hours wasted on nothing

Herbs

61932783
>>61932731
Crazy how you keep seasoning dozens and even hundreds of threads after all these years and yet you keep coming back to them like a pig at the trough.
One might even be liberal enough to say that you keep coming back to them as if you were a paypig at the trough.

61932904
>>61932558
Link will be $999 in 2126 and fudies WILL ROPE

>just hold for a century bruv

61932907
>>61932731
Ok but price? Chart?

61933029
its funny seeing the same fudders unleashing their pent up vitriol day in day out fudding their own shitcoin after all these years, brain damaged cucks lmao. You retards were smug yourselves, wasted 2 bull markets in a row being all uppity and keeping le normies out xddd, should have bought some other shitcoins and not sat on your asses hahaha maybe then you wouldnt waste your life f5'ing this dead board to cry about link (the same token that makes up 90+% of your portfolio because you're a dumb poorfaggot who has 0 clue how to make money)

61933088
>>61932522
yes

61933115
>>61933029
Nice essay but adem won

61934197
>>61933088
checked, but if you say yes then you are auto included in that 10%

61934242
money talks

item.title: What is the best way to profit off of 'the president of peace'? — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What is the best way to profit off of 'the president of peace'?

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-03-04 11:51 UTC

OP

What is the best way to profit off of 'the president of peace'?

We all know that Israel and the US's governments are in bed together, so much so that it makes more sense to think of these two countries as extensions of each other rather than individual countries. The war in Iran is 100% going to escalate further.

How do I actually make money off of this? I am already knee deep in PLTR. Is now the time to buy Lockheed Martin and Boeing? What other defense stocks are good to buy?

Early replies (first 3)

61934184
>he's even considering buying anything other than AI stocks
why, they're the ones that will pump, none of this will make sense and you'll blame the market for being irrational again

61934247
>>61934184
They're all overvalued. I kind of think PLTR is overvalued but that has a high likelihood of pumping

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: PYPL merger edition 1 — 95 replies — 380.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
PYPL merger edition 1

Open thread • Replies: 95 • Updated: 2026-03-04 11:50 UTC

OP

Here we go!

Early replies (first 3)

61891698
Do it Ryan.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61909665
no merger.
we are fucked

61909693
>>61909665
the gap will be filled

61909824
>>61904697

61910089
>>61906351
Thanks for playing, baggies.

61910124
>>61909824

61915327
Any news?

61916113
>>61915327
https://www.marketbeat.com/instant-alerts/filing-intech-investment-management-llc-purchases-30734-shares-of-paypal-holdings-inc-pypl-2026-02-28/

61918275
Is this still going to 60$? I went all in at 46 because of this thread.

61919240
>>61918275
I Hope return at price of institutional have buy

61919338
>>61892826
>$300
impressive

61919350
>>61918275
>d
the CEO will get his big cut only at $83 dollar share price MINIMUM.
look at warner bros that shit went from below $10 to now beeing baught at $30
If Paypal gets aquired it will be atleast $100

61919773
>>
https://hedgefollow.com/stocks/PYPL
Hope

61921315
>>61919350
I doubt it will go that high.

61923340
>>61923318

61923342
>>61923340

61925981
>>61904727
At the rate they were going, it wasn't going to be a big acquisition, merely a ripple on the pond

61926795
AMZN

61927102
Can someone explain why Paula even exists?? I remember you needed it for eBay back when everything was new. Somehow it morphed into the default asking to payment

61928616
>>61927102
It exists because easy cc payment processor services didn't exist for a long time. You used to give your cc info directly to the web vendors at payment, which eventually got people scammed on shady websites. Paypal was the first of its kind there. The internet has somehow COMPLETELY forgotten that money used to be a complete pain in the ass to move around. Btc, being somewhat clunky now, was actually a huge move in being able to transfer money without oversight or other friction overhead. Now that its been incorporated into the collectivist panopticon, both btc and PayPal are harder to use than just years ago

61930361
ooooooooooooooooooooooooooo

61931059
46,75$
+2,75%

61933950
I legit feel bad for PYPL bag holders. Shit was over $300 a share 5 years ago. But you guys should just dump it and put it into something else.

61933966
No.
Former PYPL invested in PLTR.
70>6>210
Now paypal 300>40>900 by ending 2028

61934006
>>61933966
>900 by ending 2028
/biz/ is worse than stocktwits bots

61934225
>>61934006
ok

61934245
>>61934225
>it happened to Palantir so it will happen to Paypal
>ignoring the fact that Palantir is benefiting from the AI boom
>also ignoring the fact that Thiel is a Trump/Vance guy and Palantir is getting lots of government contracts
Fucking retard

item.title: 100 US OIL — 20 replies — 55.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
100 US OIL

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-04 11:40 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61933655
>>61933646
ICEssies lost
EVChuds won!

61933658
>>61933646
I just fired up my bicycle!

61933661
Let the kaffir deal in the real world

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933668
>>61933661
Bidens gas prices!

61933670
>>61933646
Got a ban on driving for half a year recently.
It suddenly feels good to not be involved with gas prices kek.

61933678
Fucking hell

61933712
>>61933646
no

61933723
>>61933646
1 Liter fuel is 2 Euro again, Diesel slightly lower. Amerimutts complain about not even half of that with higher wages.

61933760
>>61933646
I voted for this

61933787
>>61933712
>CFD Petrolio WTI
europoor spotted

61933802
>>61933723
Here it's 1.26. Saturday it was 1.16 for Diesel. Cunts just waited for a reason to bump prices

61933843
>>61933787
spot americh

61933854
>>61933723
amerimutts love to bitch and moan about everything
they pay less for fuel, cars and houses while earning more than me
I hate them so god damn much it's unreal

61933923
>>61933802
Wow wtf where? Bulgaria?

61933934
>>61933923
Yeah. It was fairly quiet at the pumps yesterday, but i live in small town, so things in big cities might be different. Romania i think has the lowest fuel prices in the area (outside of Turkey, but Turkey is turbofucked by inflation). I was surprised how expensive fuel is in Serbia and Hungary though.

61933947
>>61933934
I hope americans also suffer at least, this is painful

61933970
>>61933712
>that time crude went negative
fun memories

61933976
>>61933658
https://youtu.be/nxU2UjAjN24?si=Ikj3g6n-ZJtlHujt

61934153
>>61933646
its still cheap, oil was 150 like 16 years ago, then add all the inflation created, it should be around 200 looking at all the other prices, gold was 800 when oil was 150, thats 5 barrels for one oz, today you can buy 70 barrels for one oz

61934229
>>61934153
That was a generational blowofftop. Also what has Gold to do with that?

item.title: /pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins — 73 replies — 31.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
/pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-03-04 09:43 UTC

OP

ARR!

Early replies (first 3)

61926222
yarrr

61926235
>>61926222
arr har har harr! get ye telescope and check this shipmate!

61926254
Arrgh matey, IQCHADJEETs Silva stock bussin nigga frfr on kirk nigga

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61928884
>>61928841
>Only paper silver pumps and dumps like a shit coin.

Talking about shitcoins good Ol' Black Rock one of the biggest real estate assets collectors is starting to liquidate its Bitcoin assets. Doesn't seem like it's a good year to be a crypto bro.

61928922
>>61928867
Blood moon, im gonna COOM!

61928930
>>61928870
The premiums are normally lower. When things are unstable they get very high.

>>61928848
I am talking about $10+ pumps and dumps happening in a single day. That is not natural. If this dropped $15 dollars in a month it would be believable. But you can't even do that because of real supply and demand for silver. And everyone can see when the big dumps happen and figure out who is doing it based on time zone. Cartels killing Mexican miners and silver bombs being dropped on Iran is now added onto your cheap silver tamping problems.

61928997
>>61928930
You're forgetting about Jane Street recently becoming one of the biggest Silver Futures holder right now. You know, the same one being investigated by India and China.

https://coinpedia.org/news/why-is-silver-falling-jane-streets-1-3b-slv-bet-sparks-manipulation-debate/
https://www.reuters.com/world/india/jane-street-deposits-567-million-escrow-accounts-per-india-regulatory-directives-2025-07-14/
https://archive.is/wip/dCGDy

Fuckers are even beating Black Rock. Trying to apply technical analysis to this market while fun is ultimately an exercise in futility if you don't know all of its key players suppressing the price. The only good position in Silver is owning it physically.

61929008
>>61928997
>The only good position in Silver is owning it physically.


The choice of broke retards,,,,no thanks shill

61929016
>>61928930
>Cartels killing Mexican miners and silver

The price dropped $20 yall said this would make it go up $30,,,,lmao yall learned nothing and still claim to nostradamus

61929416
>>61929008
Most of us bought years ago. Myself included. (And yes I did sell a few ounces when it was over $80 a while ago.) The rest are people willing to buy at a loss or are retards. I am here to watch for fun. You are not stressing me out. I wait for Comex to be found empty with glee.

61929468
>>61929416
>And yes I did sell a few ounces when it was over $80 a while ago.
absolutely no shame in that. It's quite literally what silver is for. You buy it when the price is low, build up your stack, and once the GSR closes down like it did recently you sell off no more than half of your stack and convert the FIAT you receive into free gold.
Holding silver forever hoping it will make you rich one day is the same as buying bitcoin nowadays and hoping for the same.
Rinse and repeat.

61929486
About to try and get a refund from TD, been 36 business days and no confirmation of my 4 bars being shipped. They’re gonna try and say some final sale bullshit, but they’ve not held up their part of the “contract”. I stupidly grabbed 5 one ounce silver maples 2 weeks ago, might try to lump that in with the refund (x to doubt for this part being refund) cause I could just run and slurp those 5 locally for same price I paid on TD. Inb4 I get the refund and silver moons before I get the cash back in my account to go buy at my LCS

61929507
I considered selling a little silver for gold recently but quite like that Clive Thompson characters approach if at least waiting for 30to one instead of 50plus. It's nice to have a little pike of silver anyway even if I prefer gold. So atm I'll jyst dca more

61929573
>>61929468
Didn't sell my gold. Not buying gold right now. Maybe in a few years I will buy some bling. Waiting for stock market cheapies and pampering myself this month. Thanks occult retards. You are so predictable. It is fun to find out how many of you blackmailed ziontards own shares stocks I still hold.

61929582
>>61929573
please rewrite that in English and without the schizobabble

61929747
>>61929582
People who got rich have multi generational wealth spend money to cause things to fulfil prophesies because they are bored. It works until people catch on and can figure out when they buy and sell stuff. Purim blood moon at 3:33 AM PST? Massive sell off. Sell some of your stocks and before that day especially institutional investor heavy stocks. Then wait for cheapies in things you were eyeing. Just bought a share of an oil stock that dumped. Makes no sense that it would dump when it was showing the start of a long slow upward trajectory before a classic bull run. And that was before the Iran thing. Oil stock are hardly dumping because they shouldn't be. Aware people are buying today while they dump good stocks for no apparent reason because of dumb rituals. I will wait much longer for other things. I know this could go on for years.

61929770
>>61926208
Anyone else remember AYY lmao coin anon?
Had to sell all his coins because of a family emergency like 2 years ago

I still think about this alien coins he had some fucking cool shit
Poor fucker missed the pump

61929916
>>61929486
Anyone ever tried or had luck with refunding from TD precious metals? Shithawking the chart before I send off my email, knowing today it’ll pull some Talmud magic and moon when I ask for a refund/get refunded

61930008
>>61926208
4 March 2027, we meet and see who has the last laugh. You confident?

61931300
>>61930008
2027? absolutely. but you should be in a bunker by then.

61931346
>>61928874
never left, glad to see you too shipmate
>>61928544
this shipmate knows the course.
>>61928696
would buy that coin if i saw it in a shop, gave me a hearty har har!

61931497
kek baggies

61931541
This shit is too jewed, I'm going back to trading natural gas

61931566
kek shaggies

61931581
>>61931541
>fiat brain

61931664
>>61931497
>>61931541
^land lubbers

61931697
OP I have been enjoying your in-character Long John Silver posts.

61931715
>>61931697
it be the way of a pirate, t'be sure. make merry and enjoy life! especially when there be plunder to be had booty to be hoarding! nothing be warming the heart like the glow of gold from within me chest, ARR!

61931989
>>61931715
Yo-Ho
I've restocked the Flying Dutchman Captain

61932481
>>61931989
I regret buying moderately priced gin this week. I will pull out my free whiskey I looted from my relative's liquor cabinet. And yes I did loot. Boomer fag buys liquor faster than he can drink and forgets what he has. He wouldn't miss it. I am telling you Captain Silver, Boomer liquor cabinets have the best forgotten booze to take as booty.

61932523
>>61932481
Good man. Also damn you could be my nephew someday soon I better watch my stash"P

61933973
>>61926208

>WE ARE SO BACK
>OH FUCK SHILLCOIN IS CRASHING
>WE ARE SO BACK
Crypto is so fucking volatile, there is going to be a day when it crashes, and it aint coming back.

item.title: I just found out about “The Work Number” It’s Equifax’s wagie permanent record where all of your work history and salary… — 13 replies — 21.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I just found out about “The Work Number” It’s Equifax’s wagie permanent record where all of your work history and salary…

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-04 11:25 UTC

OP

I just found out about “The Work Number”
It’s Equifax’s wagie permanent record where all of your work history and salary information is listed. It’s what most HR departments use to verify employment history and your pay when applying to a new job
>mfw I now realize I can’t quit a job because it goes on some gay permanent record I can’t lie about

The US is really a dystopian shithole lmao

Early replies (first 3)

61931254
Probably the only list I’m not on kek

61931255
>>61931247
>the it's going on your permanent record meme is real

61931268
>>61931247
they don't. it's for minimum wagie extremes. real blue collar white collar jobs don't get listed there unless they are mcfranchisetm. focus on crafting your resume around overselling to the fags

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931310
>>61931247
modern wageslavery is truly dystopian. Your slavehistory goes onto an immutable ledger so slaveowners can more accurately assess your usefulness.

61931326
>>61931254
based

61931352
>>61931268
Literally not true. If your job uses ADP as a payroll processor I can assure you it’s on the Equifax report

61931392
Those niggas on r/overwork are always complaining about this. I think you can request to have it frozen.

61933223
Well, the last employer who made me a job offer clearly didn't use it, because both their initial and counter offer were less than I currently make and would represent a 30% pay cut when factoring in cost of living in the new location. This is a place that requires a security clearance.

61933419
>>61931352
Guess none of my jobs have ever checked it then, never had any confrontation about making jobs up over the years.

61933453
>>61933223
Most places that pull it only do so after getting hired to make sure you aren't lying. Typically they can get similar info from a credit check (usually baked into your criminal background check) so they don't always use TWN if the other forms are close enough.

If they pulled it, it would usually be during your two-weeks with your previous employer and they may recind the offer without telling you why or give some BS about how the budget was pulled or similar lie.

61934181
>>61931254
Lmao

61934188
>>61931254
haha good one

61934196
this kind of shit would be illegal even in Europe

item.title: "Networking" is a waste of time — 47 replies — 10.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
"Networking" is a waste of time

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-03-04 07:37 UTC

OP

> If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
> Try to network within your friends or family, "Yeah sure I know such and such and they'll let you know!" and you never hear anything back again
> Go to job fairs; "THANK YOU FOR YOUR RESUME! *shakes your hand* YOU CAN APPLY ONLINE AT WWW....NEXT!!!"

Where's the REAL advice on how to make money for once, outside of the memes "get a job" (which btw there are no real entry level jobs anymore) or "just gamble bro" (and end up in the 90%+ lost money statistic).

Sigh.

Early replies (first 3)

61930524
>>61930491
You join forces with other 4channers at a meetup in Miami.

61930527
>>61930491
true

61930539
>>61930491
anon, networking is a euphemism for "sucking cock". You want a job but have little to no experience? go to a bingo night for the elderly. Find the most homosexual old boomer faggot you can find and flirt with him. Be clear adn direct: I'll suck your cock for a job or penetrate you at your whim. Please. Then you land the job. You never noticed Bingo nights are full of 20 year old femboys flirting with old men. Of coarse not, you won't be asking retarded questions about networking here otterwise

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931991
I've spent so much time building infrastructure in 100% independence to where my independent lifestyle compounds on itself. I'm too powerful and scare the Network Gen Xer with the audacity of my existence being a thing.

61932160
>>61931991
Take this mindset, and add that everyone else is expendable. You don't need to network.

61932381
>>61930491
It'll come to you, you have to figure it out on your own. Just watch the way shit works and it'll become clear.

If you don't have high IQ then you're ngmi

61932389
>>61931936
No one on 4chan is your friend. Anyone you "meet" here is a glownigger who wants to rape you and throw you in federal prison for the rest if your life so they can pin some shit on you that you simply cannot defend against.
This is not the place for making friends, it's the place for exchanging ideas and pondering things.

61932435
>>61930491
Are you ugly?

61932468
Networking is just making friends dumbass. You don’t try to network, your network emerges naturally

61932475
join the masons

61932476
>>61930491
"networking" is just non drug addicts exchanging phone numbers and complimenting each other's chubby wives

61932478
>>61932389
why would a glownigger bother trying to pin shit on a bunch of broke NEETs and send them to prison?

61932680
>>61932478
Because entry level glowniggers need to nail someones ass to prove their worth. Like how spartans had to kill a slave without getting caught, only legalistic.

61932690
>>61930491
networking is the business term for making friends. just be a human and talk to people, dont be needy and expect things from others.

61932775
>>61932680
Most retarded shit I have ever read

61932941
>>61932690
This. "Networking" is just me calling my buddies who are also in software and asking if their work is hiring when I am looking for a new job. They slip my resume in to the boss man past HR, and they get a nice bonus when I get hired. Which I will because I'm also actually good.

61932944
>>61930491
Rich people are just a bunch of retard that waste money in cocaine

61932961
>>61930630
>How to Speedrun The Downfall of Western Civilization

61932998
>>61932389
>This is not the place for making friends
Maybe not for a faggot like you

61933006
>>61932998
>>61932389
Some of my oldest and best friends are from 4chan. Granted, it is a different place these days.

61933012
>>61930491
>If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
You don't understand what networking is.

61933013
>>61933006
There are still a lot of younger people attracted to 4chan for some reason. If you enjoy having friends that might be a decade younger than you they're out there and willing to meet. Just don't bother with /soc/, bunch of homos and retards.

61933089
>>61932775
Whatever man, it's your ass if they're on that shit.

61933121
>>61930630
>Be an Indian who always has energy for endless bullshit but never the spirit to build/innovate
Response is fake but reflects reality. This is how boomers hire and why we're being replaced.

61933152
>>61933013
Nah I stick to the blue boards. /soc/ is fuckin gross.

61933171
>>61930630
>If you don't finish the event energised, at least a dozen business cards in your hand
but i'm always tired, depressed, and i hate to socialize :(

61933249
The networking advice they give to high school and college kids is hilarious. Nobody wants to "network" with some nameless fungible newbie. If you're starting from zero and don't have some kind of edge like a rich uncle or a gigachad face, then networking means befriending other entry level people and keeping up with them so they'll remember you after they move to a new company and get promoted. It takes years, even decades to pay off. If you're lucky you might also impress a manager who will let you ride his coattails as he moves up the corporate ladder, but don't count on that.

61933294
>>61932680
What the fuck is wrong with you

61933544
>>61933294
I am reasonably well seasoned, my (merited) fear of spooks keeps me from doing sketchy shit, like meeting complete and total strangers off of 20th century German literature forums.

Didn't you parents ever tell you not to meet up with strangers off the internet?

61933551
>>61933544
The first time I met people from 4chan it was to get drunk deep inna woods and shoot at dirt with a bunch of firearms. I'm still alive.

61933577
>>61933551
What, 20 years ago before feds and every other bad actor started lingering here looking for someone to exploit like a nigger hanging outside a gas station late at night?

I treat people here like I treat people at work. At arms length. I'll talk with you, but I absolutely do not want to hang out outside of here and I DEFINITELY don't want you knowing my personal business/details. That's how you get murdered and raped.

61933662
>>61933577
Yeah over 15 years ago anyway.

61933702
>>61930491
Join the military and die for Israel

item.title: ""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE"" — 38 replies — 10.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE""

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-04 08:17 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61921606
>>61921599

>exchanges
Deserved.

61921612
>>61921599
What is slippage and who would set it to 99%.... Probably above 100 iq bigbrain bros fr fr no cap!

61921797
>>61921599
why did you repost this shit from the last decade?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923392
>>61922425
What is slippage?

61923405
>>61921599
Guess he should have set a higher gas fee lmao

61923519
>>61922206
>PoS
it's in the name

61923521
>>61921797
it’s last week you retard

61923564
>>61922425
yep, obviously not when they can’t control it.

61923565
Meanwhile.......

61923572
>>61922425
link solves this unironically

61923784
>>61921599
Why isn't SVR used everywhere?

61923804
>>61921599
>eth
There’s your problem.

61924939
>>61921599
Wtf does this even mean in plain English? I'm somewhat retarded, can someone explain

61924989
>>61921599
Wait a second that's not a transaction that's random AI slop

61925063
>>61924989
You're telling me you don't use "Uniowap V3"?

61925067
>>61924939
https://www.coinbase.com/learn/crypto-glossary/what-are-sandwich-attacks-in-crypto
only happens with PoS shitcoins like ETH

61925211
I'll try to explain it as simply as possible:

Everything in a blockchain is public and these swaps (like uniswap) use pools of tokens to facilitate trades...so a USDT/USDC swap has an equal amount of each token.

As people trade more USDT for USDC, the price of USDC goes up relative to USDT...so basically as the number of USDC goes to 0, the price of USDC (in terms of USDT) goes to infinity. The idea is you always want an even amount in each pool to keep prices stable.

People run blockchain validators with software called "flashbots" which is very quick software. These validators get to decide the order of transactions in a blockchain, and they generally order transactions based on who is willing to pay the most in txn fees.

So an analogy would be something like: you walk into a currency exchange and say "I'M GONNA SWAP $215K (i.e. USDC) for Swiss Francs (i.e. USDT)! Some guy hears you say this and cuts the line to get ahead of you (i.e. outbids your txn so he can do an exchange before you).

He basically then runs up to the counter and buys a bunch of Swiss Francs before your turn comes up.

Because he just bought a large amount, the exchange booth now has fewer Swiss Francs left and a lot more dollars. So the exchange rate changes...Swiss Francs just became more expensive.

Now it’s your turn.

You still go through with your $215K exchange, but the rate is no longer the fair 1:1 rate you expected. Since the booth’s supply of Swiss Francs is now low, the clerk gives you a terrible rate. You get way fewer francs than you should have.

Right after your trade finishes, the guy who cut in line steps back up to the counter.

Now the booth has tons of dollars (because of your big swap) and Swiss Francs are overpriced. So he sells the Swiss Francs he just bought back to the booth at this new, better rate.

He walks away with more dollars than he started with.

61925234
>>61924989
We are currently witnessing the beginning of the end, not long before the internet will become unusable

61925244
>>61921606
does that include the nasdaq?

61925264
https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=UnPIVmkfSbs
>is this guy talking about metalicus?

61925270
>>61925211

61925297
>>61921599
I interviewed with a company that does this.
Gravity Team.
This is exactly what they do. They have bots operating on 60 exchanges jewing everyone.
Owned by a Russian jew.

61925316
>>61925270
Curious...why do you think that response was generated by AI? It is sad that any time you try to give an explanation on biz now, people just assume it is GPT. The rate at which people are offloading all thinking to AI is pretty demoralizing actually.

The original response to that post would have been:

>go back
>reddit spacing

or something similarly gay

61925340
>>61925297
This isn't really "jewing" people...it is a feature of how these networks work and there are plenty of ways to avoid being sandwich attacked like this. So if you get sandwich attacked this badly, it's just ignorance. There are also networks that have fair ordering natively.

61925343
>>61921606
>>exchanges
It's not an exchange

nigger just use the correct slippage wtf

61933793

item.title: Does IQ make you more successful financially? — 46 replies — 8.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Does IQ make you more successful financially?

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-03-04 06:52 UTC

OP

Does IQ make you more successful financially?

Early replies (first 3)

61927833
>>61927814
No, but emotional intelligence does.

61927872
>>61927833
>emphaty
retard detected

61927878
>>61927814
>>61927833
>>61927872


now post her without make up and filters and 0.1sec clips

i'll wait

fucking yellow fever fags

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61928414
Asian pussy makes you successful. That's why WMAF is the future.

61928426
>>61927833
>Motivation
All is vanity as the preacher said. I can do things though but my heart will not be in any of them
>Social skills
Yes, i have them but i hate people and choose to avoid them like the plague
>Empathy
Real intelligence entails high levels of empathy. I get you're sad but i won't cry with you because your cat has died. I don't expect you to cry if my father dies. I won't. It's the circle of life, Simba.
>Self awareness
I can read a room perfectly enough to know when my antisemitic jokes haven't landed as i expected
>Self regulation
Buzzword i don't know what it means. I can regulate and adjust myself according to the situation.

61928448
>>61927814
I have ~130IQ and i'm a poorfag NEET college dropout at 24. I have very little self-control or motivation so it's hard to get and hold a job, and I am very socially awkward so it's hard to make connections (the only way to get any skilled job nowadays), so i ended up an outcast. Many people in that range seem to have similar issues.

However, if you have 110-120IQ you probably will be "normal" enough to not be a weird outcast and smart enough to get ahead of most normalfags, and if you're >145IQ you're a genius and will probably end up being world-class at something.

I'm not trying to sadpost or get sympathy, it's just what I've observed.

61928455
>>61928448
Yea being king of the midwits is the best, you just crash out if you have le intelligence and realize we live in hell

61928672
>>61927833
Every billionaire is a psycho that eats the babies he just raped and the goyim be like
>duuuude just be nice and money will come to you :)

61928885
>>61928448
I'm sorry man. Whenever I meet academic people they seem to be not that bright. Often they can only do that one thing they are specialized and that's it. They just had that motivation to study hard but they are not that smart. Still they make make good money. They just fit into the system and profit from it.

61928893
>>61927814
IQ is simply the ceiling for skill and knowledge. It alone doesn't guarantee anything.

61929003
>>61928885
That's because academic people *aren't* that bright. The median IQ of college professors is only 128, only slightly higher than medical doctors (124).
>>61928448
I have a 161 IQ and I'm also a college dropout.
>if you're >145IQ you're a genius and will probably end up being world-class at something
I wouldn't say I'm world-class at anything except shitposting on 4chan, but I think the extra IQ means it's easy to do well without really trying. The place I was working had spent years and millions of dollars trying to solve some knotty problems and had made no progress despite having a PhD and several mensa members on the team. I happened to overhear some discussion about it in the lunchroom and before I finished my ham sandwich I had figured out the solution, which led to me getting promoted to the technical lead on that team and making pretty good money, a decade later I'm in the top 1% in net worth in the US, all for a whopping 5 minutes of actual thinking.

61929120
IQ doesn't exist.

The only thing it tests, is if you are cognitively retarded or not. But then again, basically any type of test can determine that.

The only reason people still talk about IQ is because people's fragile ego's and political dogmas hinge upon it. Not because it has any scientific merit.

61929203
>>61929120
>reeee this thing I don't have doesn't ackshually exist
It's funny because you think you're being clever about it, but it's all just so transparent and sad.

61929223
>>61929203
It's funny how you confirmed exactly what he said with your little emotional outburst.
I have no idea what my IQ is myself, never tested it. All the smart guys I know never tested their IQ either, if you care about it, that's already a sign you're an insecure midwit

61929256
>>61927814
how the fuck would i know

61929257
>>61929120
t. 94 IQ faggot who thought he was the next Einstein before taking the test

61929269
>>61929223
Actual smart guys were taken by their parents to a psychologist for IQ testing in grade school though, it's a necessary step for skipping grades and early graduation/college.

61929405
>>61929257
>>61929203
This is always the boring predictable response from losers and failures with no achievements in life, and no real talents. Just to bait me into revealing that I happened to score very highly on the IQ test.

Lack of introspection is a sign of low intelligence though. So naturally when you got *your* bullshit score, you didn't question it for a second, and proudly displayed it on your reddit profiles.

61929628
>>61929405
>So naturally when you got *your* bullshit score, you didn't question it for a second
this is evidence you never did an IQ test in your life

61929644
>>61929269
Why are you trying to proof he had no high IQ? You are proofing him again by doing it. "people's fragile ego's and political dogmas hinge upon it." :)

61929692
>>61927814
does pooping make women smell better?

61929814
Get a load of this young lady.
(temperance)

61930178

Its a jeet.
>hello saars pleas have the emphaty

61930196
>>61927878
she is not fat.
i simple cannot get hard with fat women.
even an average asian woman is 10x hotter than your average burger woman by virtue of not being disgustingly obese.

61930320
>>61928672
I'm opportunist and being nice pays off most of the time. They are ways to make money that require being asshole but being an asshole alone doesn't make any money. Some people always want to play against the rules but that's sailing against the wind and makes things unnecessary difficult. Most men are not willing to please a man to get rich. It doesn't need to be homoerotic. Just understanding what HE wants and giving it to him in exchange to the thing you want from him. It can be anything. Something simple as being nice or doing him a favor. Since I have a boyfriend I have learned a lot about men. They are just as emotional as women but try to hide it all the time. If you can read them anyway you know weather they like or dislike something you do. You can read if they are emotionally attached to you, to know if you can ask them for a favor.

Bullying or trolling people on 4chan doesn't make any money but people do it anyway because they want to feel good. They don't think about weather each of there actions in life will cost or gain them money long term. There only measurement is weather it feels good in the moment.

61930333
>>61927833
sounds gay

61930366
>>61927881
There is a difference between empathy and compassion. If you don't have empathy you are kind of retarded.

61930381
>>61930366
^^^

61930579
>>61927833
All five of these are so critical that lacking one can ruin your entire life. It's the term "emotional intelligence" that's really gay and ruins the whole thing. Swapping the word emotional for something like behavioral or social would be more well received.

61930771
>>61930579
That's a male problem and not the words fault. It's job is to be true, not to be seen as straight and be popular among men.

61931401
>>61930320
In my experience the most important skill to succeed is to be the kind of narcissist who can't shut the fuck up about himself. Somehow those people are always ahead. They tend to be great manipulators too
>>61930320

Well it fails at that then because "social skills" and "self awareness" are not emotions.

61933605
>>61928032

61933612

item.title: Food is so cheap it is practically free. — 112 replies — 7.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Food is so cheap it is practically free.

Open thread • Replies: 112 • Updated: 2026-03-03 21:26 UTC

OP

The image posted is in AUD, but for those in the US, Lets assume an hourly wage of $15.

$15 USD in the US can buy 25lbs of rice. which is 45,000 calories. that is astounding.

I work minimum wage (AUS) and after 2 hours of work I can afford an entire weeks worth of food.

the first hour affords me actually nearly a months worth of carbohydrate energy (rice, pasta and potato's)

The second hour affords me 3kg of meat. which is more than enough protein for a week.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Staple_food

very helpful link to understand there is actually not that much food in the entire world to eat for bulk calories/nutrition. there is about 7 different foods to eat. (wheat, rice, corn, potato, meat, dairy and bananas/plantains in certain regions, honorable mention for beans and lentils as well.)

Early replies (first 3)

61926835
People think they're too good for rice and beans, supplemented with fresh vegetables. They deserve to be poor. For the price of two colas you can buy an entire bag of beans which will feed you for weeks. Stop eating corposlop made in a lab that's marked up 10000%, eat real food.

61926840
>>61926822
>eating is so cheap when you eat like a 13th century

61926847
>>61926822
>food is so heckin cheap when you eat like a medieval Chinese peasant!
>updoots to the left!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61927747
>>61926840
>>61926847
Rice with chicken and beans is infinitely more nutritious than Mcdonalds. Cry about it you are weak. Cheap food cooked well is the most beneficial.

61927938
>>61926835
>rice and beans, supplemented with fresh vegetables
this and tuna/deenz+salad is top tier cuisine
As a student I survived so well on this. Best food ever.

61928034
>>61927193
Soil has no very little to do with nutrients. Genetics of the plant has more control over nutrients, so the long lasting bland food that was bred to be that way is the problem. Having regional markets and actual seasons for strains of vegetables that taste good and don't have a long shelf life would contribute to having more nutrients in food.

61928068
>>61926848
Mountain Dew

61928075
>>61926822
>>61926835
Holy fuck. Irredeemably delusional.
Eating only rice and beans like one day you will wake up and have a meltdown about why you did that stupid overly frugal living shit to yourself. That is not gonna be a good day.

61928215
>>61926822
the chemicals and fake meat in Mcmuttslop are literal poison, at least in europe they force these evil fucks to make real food

61928231
>>61926822
Okay great, doesn't matter though when rent is your largest expense by a huge margin

61928338
>>61926867
fpbp

61928341
>>61926867
6 billion pajeets and gooks suggest otherwise

61928406
>>61926822
>calories

Amazing maths there. I better start drinking sunflower oil instead of eating food - that has twice the calories of rice! Just 11lbs of that already beats your 45000 calories bag of rice. Astounding

61928427
>>61926835
>vegetables
anything that isn't potatoes/carrot/cabbage/onion is expensive

61928442
>>61926822
>>61926835
>>61926870
Based. Most first world people just don't have any frugal skills. They fall for the consumer slop and blame there low wage for being broke.

61928596
>>61928075
You don't need to eat beans and rice, you can eat egg rice with minced meat, that's cheap as shit too. Or something like potato with fried chicken. Or Caesar salad. All things you can easily make yourself that cost very little

61928700
>>61926822
McDonalds is garbage
Rice has no nutrition

61928746
>>61927442
Fair enough if you want me to be completely specific, because it really impossible to consume muscle meat without consuming fat, it is always connected unless you are a freak that cuts it off.
But to concede semantics, you need the muscle meat and associated fat, in a ratio of around 70-30 more or less respectively. Organs aren't required, they are nutritious, sometimes overly nutritious to a toxic level in excess.
I don't eat them mainly because they taste nasty. My bones aren't disintigrating, my muscles still grow stronger through training, my shits are 100 times better than before and I have no debilitating chronic diseases. N =1 but it just works.
To keep it /biz/ related, this diet is incredibly cheap and simple and still satiating and appetizing, and I can't recommend it enough. It won't be as cheap as beans and rice but also you won't be sick, constipated, low energy, brain fogged, skinny fat grain slave that ends up spending 200k in hospital bills and medicines.
I spend $400 a month on food, but I do get the much more expensive grass fed ground beef and special cuts from a local farm because I can afford it. If you are in a pinch, those 70/30 beef tubes from walmart could easily get you to survive with minimal effort and probably only $150 a month or so.

61928773
>>61928700
Rice is ok. I wasted way too much of my life studying biochemistry.

Its kinda shit to have incomplete proteins with low bioavailability. You want to have like 1 gram per pound of bodyweight of protein per day. Ideally Cysteine & Taurine.

Look into the cuts of meat we stopped eating in like the late 1800s/early 1900s, these ones are cheap and actually have what we need

61928775
>>61926835
>People think they're too good for rice and beans,
yes, I am rich.

61928813
>>61926822
it's never been easier to avoid eating slop because as well as raising the prices so much food companies also have degraded the quality of ingredients in many snacks and processed foods so they don't taste good anymore.

61928855
>>61927677
retard, carbs are key for energy and recovery, you just have to learn to eat the right amount at the right time, 100g rice 2-3 hours before lifting, 40g rice after lifting to restore glycogen stores, lower carbs at dinner, etc…

61928879
>>61928855
>retard, carbs are key for energy and recovery,
(in your opinion)
after a few months of adaptation, 0 carb btfo carb loading in virtually every single scenario, along with other added benefits. Carbs are just trash. Even animals that eat only plants like cows convert their food into fatty acids through fermentation.

61928887
>>61928773

My go to lunch bowl is rice + eggs + peas (or something else). Very cheap and basically macronutritionally complete.

61928919
>>61926822
>t. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_pDTiFkXgEE

61930720
Feds on 4chan teaching chuds how to cook to prevent collapse wasn't on my 2026 bingo card

61930744
For me, it's oats. They contain:
>Magnesium (muscle and nerve function)
>Iron (oxygen transport)
>Zinc (immune health)
>B vitamins (energy metabolism)
>Manganese (bone formation, metabolism)
>Protein (more than most grains)
>Contains avenanthramides (unique antioxidants in oats)

61930997
As a Dutchman for me it's potatoes, meat, vegetables.

61931628
>sis just eat 2 kg of rice and beans
you're not only paying for calories, you're paying for how compact they are

61931776
>>61926835
Blessed.

61931835
Damn som not even paella?

61931883
>>61926835
They hate you because you speak the truth

61931942
>>61926822
someone actually wrote this whole post

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-03-04 05:14 UTC

OP

61931291

61931302
>>61931288

61931311
>>61931302
>>61931291
>>61931288
He's right though

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931967
>>61931311
i dont watch niggerball. how does 5 year $100M contract turn into a 5 year $60M contract? the rest of his explanation makes sense: taxes, acting like a coon, etc.

61931992
>>61931967
It turns to $60m because of taxes and agents

61932006
>>61931288
>naaah nigguh I want that Lambo fuck your index fund

61932019
>>61931967
It's often line up with specific target goals the player has to make which is a hefty goal.
There goes another 20 million.
Then you have mandatory coach, manager and stadium fees.

61932020
>>61931992
it fucking doesn't lol

61932022
Saddest part is the teams and league hire a bunch of financial planning jews to prevent this. And the service is free. It's bad optics for their players to go bankrupt.
But naww man I aint need dat shit.

61932031
People who get CTE for a living probably don't make good investments

61932036
>>61932020
Agent takes $3m
Taxes takes $43.65m at 45%
That leaves him with $53.35m over 5 years

61932053
>>61932020
True, it's less.
Nigger must be forgetting the oxygen taxes.

61932058
That nigger can't even theorize what the difference between 30 million and 60 million would be, and neither can the average mutt. Just fucking park 40 million into CDs or bonds and you still make 1.6 million? Fuck even holding that much in silver since 2019 and he would've had a 5x on his stack.

Why do liberals love to hawk at successful entrepreneurs like bezos and musk for not eradicating poverty when niggers like this and billie eyelash gets a pass?

61932073
>>61931288
... if you are a nigger

61932140
>>61931288
How to become and stay rich

Step 1: don't be a retarded nigger

61932153
>>61931288
>His bank gifted him a car
What?

61932198
>>61931288
>famous TV negro goes broke
I'm going to guess he was doing 84mo loans on his Bugattis from native americans for 1000% APR, or some dumb nigger shit like that

61932440
>>61931311
>>61931288
he should have let his white masta manage his money for him, then he wouldnt be deal with these issue.

61932444
>>61931311
how else am i as a famous person going to hush all the women i raped and the minors i molested, as well as pay my lawer when this shit inevitably hits the fan?

61932449
>>61932020
It's less actually hes in the top bracket so 37% federal, 10% for new york, 3.7% for nyc that's over half his income stolen by the government before his agent gets his gibs

61932469
He made 1 million dollars a month. All he had to do was put half in an index fund. Use the other half to lease cars, rent a mansion and chimp out

61932474
>>61932469
btw he probably did commercials, and had sponsorships wtf lmao.

61932492
>>61932474
The nigger ball player is the peak example why you cant just give people money and expect it to wildly improve their lives. Sure maybe 10% or even 15% of homelessness is caused by external factors out of their control. But the vast majority of people in general only operate on a surface level thinking.

61932506
When you’re publicly rich, every single thing l.e. forces you to pay for. Every single word out of your mouth costs a dollar amount. Every single social interaction the other person has to get paid for.

61932528
>>61931311
if you all are going be jewish like this, why not just say 12m instead of 120m
>retards

61932553
>>61931312
> 1 in 10 Americans are millionaires
That's over 35 million millionaires
There's enough millionaires in America to fill up a megacity
Historically speaking that's outrageous

61932636
>>61931311
>>61931288
>>61931960
They account for this in the drafting/management of players. Ones who spend/save/invest wisely are a threat to the business model, because they throw water on the spectacle and are also way more likely to hold the leagues/players associations to account. If players come out of their careers independently wealthy, they can't be controlled by the unions. The NBA had a dude like this and he caused all kinds of headaches for owners.
If you refuse to play the "flaunt" game and act like you've got some sense with your money, you start to see opportunities disappear. You can only have but so many players who are set and can go, "Yeah, I'ma go free agent and head where I'm treated best," before the business model has to change.
It's all about control. They love guys like this one because they show that the protocol works for their purposes. People will continue to end up where they're placed until they wake up and stop taking what they're given without thinking deeply about the situation and acting accordingly.
Honestly, this also applies to many professions where there's pressure to be profligate. This is the reason why. You're supposed to live beyond your means because it's part of the plan to keep you at least predictable, if not out-right controlled. So I don't really fault people for falling for it.

61932694
>>61931288
Athletes in general get raped (financially) all the time. Too many bottom feeders holding out their hands going 'gimme' then chimping out when told no. The only one that's managed to get away with that is Manny Pacquaio and that's because he lives in third world Phillipines where a dollar is like a million pesos to them.

Evander Holyfield had to fight deep into his 40s despite making 250+ million dollars because he was retarded and bought an uber mansion with tons of cars and had tons of babies with different mamas and they all wanted 5 figure child support because women don't care about men, even their fathers.

Adrien Broner is deep in debt and yet his last paycheck he went out and partied. Athlete's are retarded with money bottom line and too many people from managers to agents to finance guys to so called friends and families see them as nothing more then a bank account their entitled to.

61932710
>>61931967
It's worse in boxing. Say you make a 100 grand for a fight. Your promoter gets a percent right off the top. So does your manager, and maybe your coach too. Percentages vary but I've seen promoter and manager percentages go as high as 30%. Then you pay your cutman and second, then you pay your training camp (if its away from home) and sparring partners. Then you pay whatever nutritionist and S&C coach, your publicist, flight, fees, etc. and taxes. At the end you're looking at far less then what you earned on paper. Bernard Hopkins said his first million payday only 50% actually made it into his bank account.

61932753
>>61931288

61932881
>>61932528
>why not let the goyim know their 17 dollar an hour job is actually 9 dollars an hour after taxes and reductions

61933005
>>61931288
Why are you faggots obsessed with "generational" wealth? Even if you raise your children perfectly, it is only a matter of a few generations down the line before they become decadent and lose your fortune. At most just provide them a beater car, a starter house, and pay for their education.

61933411
>>61931288
they could give him 100 billion and he'd still go bankrupt
funny how you only see this with blacks, everyone else seems to have little issue managing money

item.title: WTF IS THIS JEWISH SHIT? — 32 replies — 7.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF IS THIS JEWISH SHIT?

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-03-04 07:32 UTC

OP

i invested 5k on a parlay that we will be in a war with Iran by the end of the year. CLEARLY we are in a war. But since the State department says we are not, my parlay doesn't HIT? WTF

Early replies (first 3)

61931033
get fucked gambler

61931036
>>61931026
You are dealing with a race people who invented a special light switch so that they can trick God himself

61931046
>>61931026
This is fucking obvious though congress are the only ones with the power to declare war? Its just another trick he uses so that he can be Israel greatest solider

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931050
>>61931026
I voted for this

61931054
>>61931026
Trump has been saying he's not into starting wars for like 10 years now. If you bet against that you deserve what you get, sorry but Dems are projecting as usual.

61931056
Get fucked tranny. Not a war just because MSDNC says so

61931064
>>61931033
BTC and Stox are literally gambling faggot

61931065
>>61931026
What Market did get affected by this?

61931082
>>61931026
Lol, you're trusting Jews and pajeets to make an unbiased call where money is concerned

61931156
>>61931026
I think 1942 was the last time we formally declared war. America is a nation of peace.

61931183
So everyone made fun of russia's special military operation and now they do exactly the same? Clown world

61931227
>>61931183
Trump's getting raped in the midterms and he's finally getting clobbered in the courts too.

61931237
>>61931026
you are stupid as fuck for betting on things that have open ended answers rather than very clear conditions

61931253
>>61931183
He's repeating all Putin's talking points too lmao
Even did the whole "we're not even using our full power" bit

61931274
>Betting on something where the rules and definitions are vague and can be changed whenever or declared whatever they want at any time
Retards. Might as well just hang yourself up in a kosher slaughterhouse.

61931283
I mean, it's more akin to Libya/Syria. We're helping another force conduct their war. Tel Aviv is getting bombed not New York and LA.

61931289
>>61931026
> polymarket
Haven't you figured out yet, that many of the events you can bet on offer a way out for these criminally creative minds?

61932023
>>61931283
Would be nice too.

61932046
Day 4 of the SCO

61932091
>>61931026
>I invested 5k down at the horse races

61932104
>>61931227
He's gonna get a third term

61932120
>>61931026
>This isn't a bank robbery
>It's simply an excision of the money from the bank by means of force with lethal coercion

61932143
>>61931026
This is the problem with predication markets is the subjectivity of everything which allows Polymarket to effectively choose the outcome themselves unless it is for something black and white like the outcome of a sports game

61932149
>>61931026
How many more examples do you gamblers need to finally understand that they don't pay you out any significant amount?

61933067
>>61932104
Put money on it clittycel

61933076
This is why I'll never touch those retarded ass prediction markets

61933225
>>61931046
They neglected that duty for decades. They are faggots.

61933409
>>61931026
You're playing in an industry that says "Whoops, sorry machine was broken!" when someone hits a jackpot and refuses to pay out.

61933417
polymarket is where you go to donate crypto to whitehouse insiders

61933634
>>61931026
>special combat operation

61933689
>>61931036
And God is still seething that he got owned so hard

61933693
>>61931026
these kikes deleted my polymarket account cus i was inactive for like 2 months and stole the money that was there
